exercises.title: Platform Performance Simulator
exercises.description: Simulate and compare hardware platform performance for repeater applications.
tasks: Find optimal segment count per platform
hints: Key metrics: coherence, gate fidelity, photon efficiency

exercises.title: Repeater Network Designer
exercises.description: Design optimal repeater network for given topology.
tasks: Input city locations and target requirements
exercises.expectedOutput: Network design and cost estimation tool
hints: Consider fiber routes, not straight lines
Power scales with number of nodes

exercises.title: Technology Roadmap Analyzer
exercises.description: Analyze technology requirements and project development timeline.
tasks: Define current technology state of the art
Estimate timeline based on historical progress
hints: Integration often harder than component development

exercises.title: Field Deployment Planner
exercises.description: Plan practical field deployment of quantum repeaters.
hints: Classical control systems must be low-latency
